start.welcome:
👋 Welcome to **Telegodex**\!

Hello, {name}\!

I'm an intelligent assistant with multi\-provider AI support, supporting:
{providers}

Send any message to start a conversation, or use the menu buttons\!

📌 Quick commands:
/new \- Start a new conversation
/settings \- Settings
/help \- Help

help.text:
📖 **Help**

**Basic commands:**
/start \- Start the bot
/new \- Start a new conversation
/clear \- Clear current conversation
/settings \- Open settings
/help \- Show help

**Features:**
• Send a message to chat with AI directly
• Multi\-turn conversation with automatic context saving
• Switch between AI providers in settings
• Full Markdown support

**Markdown examples:**
\*italic\* \- *italic*
\*\*bold\*\* \- **bold**
\[link\]\(url\) \- [link](https://example.com)
\`code\` \- `code`

model.switched:
✅ Switched to `{provider}`\.
_Messages in this thread are now isolated per provider\._

callbacks.confirm_clear: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to clear all conversation history? This action cannot be undone!

errors.empty_input: ⚠️ Message is empty or too long
errors.no_provider: ❌ No AI provider available, please check configuration

history.empty_conversation: 📭 No history messages in this conversation.

chat_tool.permission_denied:
Permission is currently `Chat only`. I will not run commands or invoke local tools.

To inspect the local environment, execute commands, or use tools, switch the permission to `User confirm` or `⚠️ Full access` in settings before continuing.
chat_tool.approval_unavailable: Telegodex detected a tool request, but approval handling is not available in this chat runtime.
chat_tool.shell_unavailable: Telegodex full-access tool execution is unavailable because no shell provider is attached.
chat_tool.proposal_explanation: The chat AI requested this command to complete the task.
chat_tool.tool_loop_stopped: Tool loop stopped after 3 rounds. Please review the latest command result and try again.

provider_errors.hint_insufficient_balance: The current AI provider returned insufficient balance or quota. Please recharge, switch providers, or try again later.
provider_errors.hint_rate_limit: The current AI provider triggered a rate or quota limit. Please try again later or switch to another provider.
provider_errors.hint_auth_failed: The current AI provider rejected the request. Please check API Key, account permissions, balance, or relay quota.
provider_errors.hint_generic: AI provider request failed. Please try again later or switch to another provider.
